g.onclick: sendPrompt('Can you show me a code example of fit() for MinMaxScaler?')
sendPrompt('Can you show me a code example of transform() for MinMaxScaler?')
sendPrompt('When should I use fit_transform() vs fit() then transform() separately?')

svg.text: fit() only ever sees X_train. transform() applies the same learned state to X_train and X_test.
